concerns: The backend repository targets Java 21, but pom.xml is configured with <java.version>17</java.version>. This might cause a mismatch or compiler release failures in the CI pipeline.

The Flyway rollback script (U1__create_schema.sql) is placed under 'src/main/resources/db/rollback/' instead of 'src/main/resources/db/migration/' with the up script as required by project conventions.
The H2 database dependency scope in pom.xml was changed to 'runtime' from the standard 'test' scope.
In CampaignService, contact validation falls back to treating any unmatched string formats as usernames rather than throwing a validation exception or reporting bad records.
In CampaignService, the phone number validation regex '^\+?[0-9]{10,15}$' could be restrictive and does not handle spaces, hyphens, or other common formatting marks.
